name: libdata-section-perl
title: libdata-section-perl
summary: module to read chunks of data from a module's DATA section
description:
module to read chunks of data from a module's DATA section
Data::Section is a Perl module that provides an easy way to access multiple
named chunks of line-oriented data in your module's DATA section. It was
written to allow modules to store their own templates, but is probably useful
for other purposes as well.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdata-section-perl because module to read chunks of data from a module's DATA section.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdata-section-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdata-section-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdata-section-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
